stylePreset: Editorial photograph, magazine quality. Warm muted palette: cream (#faf3e9), warm clay (#c88262), deep charcoal-brown (#1c1814), warm sand (#c9a288). Soft natural light, coastal Pacific Northwest feel — cedar forest haze, low coastal sun, overcast diffused. Subtle film grain. Negative space dominant. Composition: rule of thirds with intentional asymmetry. 35mm or 50mm lens character. Portra 400 emulation. Vancouver Island mood: arbutus, cedar, weathered wood, calm Pacific water, warm interior light. No people unless specified, no text overlay, no HDR, no saturation boost.
